## Feature Summary
Clear description of the requested feature.

## Component
- [ ] Summaries Engine (FastAPI/LLM)
- [ ] Fuel Analytics (anomaly detection/trip reconstruction)
- [ ] PostgreSQL / Data layer
- [ ] Kubernetes / Deployment
- [ ] API / Integration
- [ ] Other

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like.

## Impact
- [ ] Improves audit report quality
- [ ] Improves fuel anomaly detection accuracy
- [ ] Reduces latency / improves performance
- [ ] Better data privacy / GDPR compliance

## Priority
- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## Additional Context
Any other context or references.
